prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为8088→12434→6904→17875→14775，近年波动剧烈，2024年因新高考改革位次大幅后移至17875，2025年回升至14775，近两 年均值约16325名；2025年基准约14775名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年87人、2022年88人、2023年88人、2024年88人、2025年87人，基本稳定在87–88人；2026 年计划大幅扩增至121人，较2025年增加34人，增幅约39.1%，显著扩大招生规模，竞争压力明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名202 6年第80名（2025年第79名、2024年第83名），排名稳定在80名左右，属全国中上游水平；2025年声誉评价偏负面，主要因热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人 报考；2026年声誉仍偏负面，涉及学术不端事件；抖音热度排名第77位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等偏低，未出现明显热度推高信号；第五轮学科评 估中管理科学与工程获评A级，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；工科整体实力较强，机械、电气、计算机等专业在行业内认可度高，对理科考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与合肥工业大学工科优势高度契合，有利于吸引高分考生；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数 约218700人，较2025年（物理类+历史类合计约179817人）大幅增加约21.6%，考生基数扩大加剧整体竞争；省控线方面，物理类本科批2024年370分、2025年374分，基本平稳。合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，非甘肃本省院校，在地域偏好上无明显优势或劣势；该校在甘肃招生占比约1.2%（2025年），属中等偏低水平，地域因素影响有 限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅扩招39.1%与甘肃省考生总数增长约21.6%两大核心因素，扩招幅度显著超过考生增幅，整体竞争压力趋于缓解；但声誉偏负面、工 科专业持续高热形成一定对冲。以，考虑考生规模扩大及声誉抑制效应做小幅修正，预测2026年理科/物理类最低位次约18039名，区间17539–18539 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年理科/物理类大幅扩招至121人，预测位次区间17539–18539名，较2025年基准14775名明显后移，报考难度降低。建议位次在区间内的考生以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲 刺、三档专业保底；位次优于区间下限（17539名以前）可重点冲刺计算机、电气等热门工科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 8088 → 12434 → 6904 → 17875 → 14775 respectively, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking dropped sharply to 17875, rebounding to 14775 in 2025, with an average of approximately 16325 over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 14775. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 87 in 2021, 88 in 2022, 88 in 2023, 88 in 2024, and 87 in 2025, remaining stable at 87–88. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 121, an increase of 34 compared to 2025, a growth of about 39.1%, substantially enlarging the enrollment scale and notably easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (79th in 2025, 83rd in 2024), stable around 80th, at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2025, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors having no applicants. In 2026, reputation remains somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents. Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with a rating of 'average', and short video platform exposure is moderately low, without obvious signals of increased popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline at the university. Overall, engineering strength is relatively strong, with majors like Mechanical, Electrical, and Computer Science having high recognition in the industry, providing sustained appeal to science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended, aligning well with Hefei University of Technology's engineering strengths, helping attract high-scoring students. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Gansu Province general college entrance examination is approximately 218,700, a significant increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (Physics Category + History Category total about 179,817), with the expanded candidate base intensifying overall competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the Physics Category undergraduate batch was 370 in 2024 and 374 in 2025, remaining stable. Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local institution in Gansu, with no obvious advantage or disadvantage in regional preference. Its enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2% (2025), at a moderately low level, with limited regional influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two core factors of a significant 39.1% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan and an approximately 21.6% increase in the total number of Gansu Province candidates, the expansion rate significantly exceeds the candidate growth rate, leading to an overall easing of competition pressure. However, the somewhat negative reputation and sustained high popularity of engineering majors create a certain offset. Therefore, with minor adjustments considering the expanded candidate pool and reputation suppression effects, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Science/Physics Category is approximately 18039, with a range of 17539–18539.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Science/Physics Category significantly expands enrollment to 121, with a predicted ranking range of 17539–18539, notably lower than the 2025 baseline of 14775, reducing application difficulty. It is recommended that candidates within this range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (before 17539) can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 1913 → 1805 → 7549 → 2143 → 2309 respectively. In 2023, due to exam mode adjustments, there was an abnormal significant shift to 7549. In 2024–2025, it returned to the 2143–2309 range, with a two-year average of approximately 2226. The 2025 baseline is about 2309. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 6 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 8 students in 2024–2025. The 2026 plan is 7 students, a decrease of 1 student from 2025, a slight reduction of about 12.5%, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, stable ranking. In 2025, reputation was somewhat negative (popular majors' admission scores plummeted), and in 2026, it remains somewhat negative (academic misconduct). Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with a rating of 'average', no obvious popularity signal. Management Science and Engineering is rated A, the only A- or above discipline at the university, belonging to management category, with no direct disciplinary mapping to liberal arts majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education, English). Liberal arts majors lack A-level discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has social recommendation but with divided observation; Teacher Training/Education is divided observation; Foreign Languages is generally observation. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Gansu Province is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from 2025. Estimated by historical proportion, history category examinees are about 71,000 (an increase of about 21.8% from 58,374 in 2025), expanding the candidate base and intensifying competition. For provincial control lines, the history category undergraduate batch was 421 points in 2024 and 412 points in 2025, a slight decrease. Hefei University of Technology is located in Anhui, not a local Gansu institution, with few liberal arts majors (only Law, Ideological and Political Education, English), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 12.5% slight enrollment reduction in 2026 and the approximately 21.8% increase in total examinees in Gansu Province, the combination of enrollment reduction and increased candidates intensifies competition. The somewhat negative reputation further suppresses application enthusiasm. Therefore, with a slight upward adjustment considering the expansion of the candidate pool and enrollment reduction effect, the predicted 2026 liberal arts/history category minimum ranking is approximately 2186, with a range of 1793–2579.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the liberal arts/history category enrolls only 7 students (4 in Ideological and Political Education, 3 in English), with extremely limited major choices. The predicted ranking range is 1793–2579, slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 2309. It is recommended that candidates within this range take Ideological and Political Education as the primary choice and English as a safety option; those with rankings better than 1793 can aim for Law-related directions (note that the university's Law major was offered in 2021–2022 but has not been included in recent plans).
